TestCase z7Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_elements = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_elements, t1.elements, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.elements = follow_case_elements;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n == 0
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        // No elements to modify, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: set a random position's element to 999.0 when element < 999.0
    int random_idx = rand() % follow_case.n;
    if (follow_case.elements[random_idx] < 999.0) {
        follow_case.elements[random_idx] = 999.0;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
